section_name: Speed Limit Signs After Construction or Maintenance Work Zone
text:
(a) In this section, “construction or maintenance work zone” has the meaning assigned by Section 472.022 (Obeying Warning Signs and Barricades) .

(b) An entity that sets a lower speed limit on a road or highway in the state highway system for a construction or maintenance work zone shall place or require to be placed a sign at the end of the zone that indicates the speed limit after the zone ends.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 545. Operation & Movement of Vehicles
##### § 545.364 — Speed Limit Signs After Construction or Maintenance Work Zone

(a) In this section, “construction or maintenance work zone” has the meaning assigned by Section 472.022 (Obeying Warning Signs and Barricades) .

(b) An entity that sets a lower speed limit on a road or highway in the state highway system for a construction or maintenance work zone shall place or require to be placed a sign at the end of the zone that indicates the speed limit after the zone ends.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 154 (H.B.339), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: In this section, “construction or maintenance work zone” has the meaning assigned by Section 472.022 (Obeying Warning Signs and Barricades) .

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An entity that sets a lower speed limit on a road or highway in the state highway system for a construction or maintenance work zone shall place or require to be placed a sign at the end of the zone that indicates the speed limit after the zone ends.
